items.title: EpochGuard integration into flush path
items.description: Wire page reclamation into production flush. Pages currently grow without bound on FileIo. collect_freeable() exists but not invoked.

items.title: Custom page cache tuning
items.description: LRU cache exists but needs optimization per Gemini review. Most significant missing piece for production perf.

items.title: Data page CRC32c checksums
items.description: WAL pages checksummed (FNV32), data pages not yet. Add CRC32c via crc32fast crate for silent corruption detection.

items.title: Multi-writer concurrency
items.description: Current SSI is single-writer. Evaluate partitioned writers or optimistic concurrency for higher write throughput.

items.title: Wire standalone modules into store
items.description: 12 modules built and tested but not yet integrated: 5-Vertex, Domain Decay, Stigmergic, HAPC, EPIC, REWG, SCD, CBQ, TER, EBA, and more.

items.title: CBAC (Confidence-Based Access Control)
items.description: Implement JRGM-derived governance traversal for access control. Entities exist before governance, auth accretes via CBAC spectrum.

items.title: Confidence-Aware Learning Index
items.description: Replace B-epsilon lookup with learned index that incorporates confidence distribution. Research complete, implementation pending.

items.title: Encryption at rest
items.description: AES-256 page-level encryption for on-disk data. Key management via platform integration.

items.title: Encryption in transit (TEP)
items.description: TrustDB Exchange Protocol with TLS for world graph sync and client connections.

items.title: Full audit log export
items.description: Temporal log scan_temporal_window for administrative exports and compliance reporting.

items.title: Raft consensus production-ready
items.description: Raft scaffold built. Needs leader election, log compaction, and snapshot transfer for production use.

items.title: World graph federation (FWGA)
items.description: Federated world graph anchoring for cross-instance knowledge sharing. 4-phase offline sync protocol designed.

items.title: TEP Lane A: Semantic Foundation
items.description: View<T>, EBP, AssertionMeta, SyncEnvelope/SyncDelta, GovernanceArtifact. 5 files, 2,185 LOC, 51 tests. WN-TEP-01 through WN-TEP-05.

items.title: TEP Lane B: Lens API (WN-TEP-06 to 09)
items.description: Lens core type, composition algebra, compilation to TraversalPlan, serialization as GovernanceArtifact. The governed query engine.

items.title: TEP Lane C: Mesh Sync Protocol (WN-TEP-10 to 14)
items.description: 4-phase sync (watermark delta, conflict classification, confidence restoration, gap manifest) + Lens-filtered change streams. Serves Mesh agent topology and Apple cross-device.

items.title: TEP Lane D: In-Process API (WN-TEP-15 to 17)
items.description: TrustExchange trait, store integration, HintBatch. The canonical zero-copy Rust API that all other surfaces project from.

items.title: TEP Lane E: Wire Protocol (WN-TEP-18 to 21)
items.description: Protobuf schemas, gRPC service (QueryLens/Assert/Subscribe/Sync), Arrow Flight adapter, Arrow Flight SQL compatibility. External access for Polars, DuckDB, Tableau.

items.title: Python driver (PyO3 + Lens/TEP)
items.description: Native Python bindings via PyO3 exposing Lens API, View<T>, EBP. Critical for data science and ML pipeline integration.

items.title: Swift bindings (UniFFI) for Apple ecosystem
items.description: Swift bindings via UniFFI for always-on AI vision on Watch, Phone, Mac, Vision Pro. Competing with Core Data and Realm.

items.title: Prometheus metrics exporter
items.description: Export WAT telemetry counters as Prometheus /metrics endpoint. Quick win (2 days). Pairs with Grafana dashboards.

items.title: API documentation + getting-started guide
items.description: OpenAPI/protobuf docs, Lens query examples, TrustExchange trait documentation. Required for Protocol score 9.0+.

items.title: GUI administration panel
items.description: Web-based admin UI for browsing entities, confidence envelopes, provenance chains, graph edges. Requires wire protocol (WN-TEP-19).

items.title: Real-disk (NVMe) comprehensive benchmarks
items.description: Current benchmarks mostly SimulatedIo. Need full suite on FileIo with NVMe SSD for production-representative numbers.

items.title: Comparative benchmarks vs competitors
items.description: Head-to-head against SQLite, RocksDB, Neo4j, PostGIS, Elasticsearch on equivalent workloads.

items.title: Long-running soak tests
items.description: Multi-hour continuous workload tests to validate stability, memory leaks, and WAF under sustained load.

items.title: trustdb-nvm crate: hardware-aware persistence stack
items.description: 26 source files, ~11K lines, 214 tests. Three-tier epoch persistence, platform fences, MmapBackend, CentralHashBuffer, adaptive config, write coalescer, confidence-weighted persistence, crash recovery. PRs #109–#186.

items.title: EpochWalWriter: WAL elimination from hot path
items.description: 3,000x storage energy reduction via LPSR preservation. Epoch batching keeps NVMe asleep. PRs #109–#186.

items.title: Platform fences: ARM64 + x86_64 inline assembly
items.description: ARM64 dc cvap/dsb/PRFM + x86_64 CLFLUSHOPT/SFENCE/_mm_prefetch. Hardware auto-detection for Apple Silicon, Graviton4, x86_64. PRs #109–#186.

items.title: Windows + Graviton optimizations
items.description: Windows VirtualLock/NUMA VirtualAllocExNuma. Graviton ARM64 Fargate: 20% cost, 30% perf. PRs #109–#186.

items.title: P1-07: Apple hardware power measurement
items.description: Real Apple Silicon power measurement with IOReport/powermetrics to validate NVM tier energy claims on M-series hardware.

items.title: EFS→EBS migration for NVM storage
items.description: Migrate from EFS to EBS (gp3/io2) for NVM-aligned block storage with consistent latency and IOPS provisioning.

items.title: io_uring wiring for async NVM I/O
items.description: Wire io_uring submission queue into NVM flush path for zero-copy async I/O on Linux. Replaces blocking msync calls.

items.title: BM25 fast path for NVM-backed search
items.description: NVM-optimized BM25 scoring with prefetched posting lists and confidence-weighted term frequency.
